title: Bulbophyllum gustavi
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum gustavi is a species of orchid in the genus Bulbophyllum. The genus Bulbophyllum belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The family Orchidaceae is a part of the order Asparagales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes asparagus and lilies. This classification indicates that Bulbophyllum gustavi is a flowering plant that is closely related to other orchids and asparagus-like plants. Further classification includes the class Liliopsida, which is a group of flowering plants that have parallel-veined leaves.
